sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 44267 — VESPASIAN, 69-79 C.E. AE As (10.05 gms), Lugdunum Mint, 77-78 C.E. NGC Ch F, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5.
To view all items from the Rabbi Victor H. Weissberg and Tamar Weissberg Collection, click  here.
sales.description:
VESPASIAN, 69-79 C.E. AE As (10.05 gms), Lugdunum Mint, 77-78 C.E. NGC Ch F, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5.
To view all items from the Rabbi Victor H. Weissberg and Tamar Weissberg Collection, click  here.
RIC-1233; Hendin-6593. "Judaea Capta" commemorative. Obverse: Laureate bust of Vespasian right; Reverse: Palm tree; to right, Judaea seated to right; to left, arms. Rather appealing, this Choice example provides nice strike quality, despite some circulation and surfaces faults.

From the Rabbi Vi...
